S.FORM: Keith Appling sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 2, Keith Appling, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players)
S.PHON: keitńß appliŇč s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, keitńß appliŇč, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē)
